Title: User Registration with Valid Inputs
Test Data:
- Valid email
- Valid password
- Valid name
- Valid surname
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user registration page.
2. Enter a valid email.
3. Enter a valid password.
4. Enter a valid name.
5. Enter a valid surname.
6. Click the "Register" button.

Title: User Registration with Invalid Email
Test Data:
- Invalid email (e.g., missing @ or .)
- Valid password
- Valid name
- Valid surname
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user registration page.
2. Enter an invalid email.
3. Enter a valid password.
4. Enter a valid name.
5. Enter a valid surname.
6. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user is not registered.

Title: User Registration with Empty Fields
Test Data:
- Empty email
- Empty password
- Empty name
- Empty surname
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user registration page.
2. Leave all fields empty.
3. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user is not registered.

Title: User Navigates to Homepage
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the application.
2. Click the "Homepage" link in the menu.
Expected Result: The user is redirected to the homepage.

Title: User Navigates to My Signals
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the application.
2. Click the "My Signals" link in the menu.
Expected Result: The user is redirected to the my signals page.

Title: User Navigates to Settings
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the application.
2. Click the "Settings" link in the menu.
Expected Result: The user is redirected to the settings page.

Title: Add Alert with Valid Inputs
Test Data:
- Valid title
- Valid description
- Valid category
- Valid priority
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the add alert page.
2. Enter a valid title.
3. Enter a valid description.
4. Select a valid category.
5. Select a valid priority.
6. Click the "Add Alert" button.

Title: Add Alert with Invalid Title
Test Data:
- Invalid title (e.g., empty or too long)
- Valid description
- Valid category
- Valid priority
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the add alert page.
2. Enter an invalid title.
3. Enter a valid description.
4. Select a valid category.
5. Select a valid priority.
6. Click the "Add Alert" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the alert is not added.

Title: Add Alert with Empty Fields
Test Data:
- Empty title
- Empty description
- Empty category
- Empty priority
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the add alert page.
2. Leave all fields empty.
3. Click the "Add Alert" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the alert is not added.

Title: View All Alerts
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the view alerts page.
2. Verify that all alerts are displayed.

Title: View One Alert
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the view alerts page.
2. Select one alert.
3. Verify that the selected alert is displayed.

Title: Create a New Profile
Test Data:
- Valid email
- Valid password
- Valid name
- Valid surname
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile page.
2. Click the "Profile" link in the menu.
3. Click the "Create a New Profile" button.
4. Enter a valid email.
5. Enter a valid password.
6. Enter a valid name.
7. Enter a valid surname.
8. Click the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The new profile is created successfully.

Title: Edit an Existing Profile
Preconditions: User is logged in and has an existing profile.
Test Data:
- Valid email
- Valid password
- Valid name
- Valid surname
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile page.
2. Click the "Edit" button next to the existing profile.
3. Enter a valid email.
4. Enter a valid password.
5. Enter a valid name.
6. Enter a valid surname.
7. Click the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The existing profile is updated successfully.

Title: Cancel Editing an Existing Profile
Preconditions: User is logged in and has an existing profile.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile page.
2. Click the "Edit" button next to the existing profile.
3. Click the "Cancel" button.
Expected Result: The editing is cancelled, and the existing profile remains unchanged.

Title: Delete an Existing Profile
Preconditions: User is logged in and has an existing profile.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile page.
2. Click the "Delete" button next to the existing profile.
3. Confirm the deletion.
Expected Result: The existing profile is deleted successfully.

Title: Cancel Deleting an Existing Profile
Preconditions: User is logged in and has an existing profile.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile page.
2. Click the "Delete" button next to the existing profile.
3. Click the "Cancel" button.
Expected Result: The deletion is cancelled, and the existing profile remains unchanged.
